developer_response.body: Hi there! Thank you for your review on SXM Demo. We understand your frustation, and we are working on bringing some of our additional features (simpler controls, speed) which is currently available on our paid early access version to the demo! Till then keep supporting us, lot's of fun things coming your way (including multiplayer).

developer_response.body:
Hey there! We recommend that you go through the tutorial to understand the control mechanics. SXM is all about taking FULL control of your motorbike as it's a hyper-realistic control similar to real-world bike control. We will try to incorporate the simple controls in the demo version on our next update, tho!
The auto-gear | the simple controls input is implemented in the paid version.

Control - 
Grab the bike handle using the controller's grab buttons first, start the engine by pressing button "A" , hold and press the left-hand trigger (Clutch) and slide down the left-hand analog stick to shift the gear to 1st gear from neutral, release the clutch, and twist to accelerate and move forward. All other gears are triggered up!

reviews.review_description:
This is still in early access but already this feels polished, I have never ridden a motorcycle but this gives a good sense of speed and feel.
I’m cautious at the moment but building up confidence to try bigger and better stunts.
The dev is still working on it and this is brilliant to see.
People who love motorcycles will absolutely love this.
Kudos to the dev.
Auto gears has been added so this makes it so much easier and so much more fun to concentrate on your stunts.
I think that the game is super super awesome
I TRIED CHANGING GEARS ANG I KEPT GOING TO GEAR2 DONT DOWNLOAD DONT DOWNLOAD
